source: Dmitry Telegram DM standing approval on 2026-07-07
purpose: Allow automatic bounded applies for the already-proven deterministic Obsidian link-prefix hygiene pattern without weakening apply gates.
required_gates: read occurrence from current live file immediately before proposal creation
source file is a normal Memory-Vault markdown note
exclude Hermes/Reports and generated evidence/report surfaces by default
exclude Soul-protected paths and any secrets/auth/browser profile surfaces
exact target note exists before proposal creation
apply uses approval manifest and approved backup namespace
post_verify is required and must pass
bounded one-file apply units are preferred; stop on readiness/hash/target/backup/verify failure
